Introduction

This document outlines national pulmonary tuberculosis management priorities.

1. Background

India bears a high burden of drug-resistant tuberculosis.

CONTRAINDICATIONS

For multi-drug resistant strains, administer Bedaquiline under strictly monitored DOTS context.
Do not use with strong CYP3A4 inducers without specialist review.

2. Recommendations

Follow national consensus for drug-susceptible TB treatment protocols.
